headline: CoStar Data Shows Office Yield Gap Narrowing Between London and the Big Six
summary: LONDON, May 22, 2026--Improving investor sentiment narrows the office yield gap between London and major regional markets, according to data from CoStar, a global leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets.
